source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
E1.Employee_PK,
E3.Employee_PK AS ApproverSupervisor_PK,
M1.EmployeeID,
--M1.Division,
E1.Division, 		-- Getting the Division From DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE

COALESCE(M1.LocationPK,M1.LocationPK_FHIA_BJ,M1.LocationPK_GO_SOUTHERN,M1.LocationPK_MAC,M1.LocationPK_MXH) AS LocationPK,
M1.PayDate,
M1.TimeIN,
M1.TimeOUT,
M1.Hours,
M1.EarningCode,
M1.WorkedDepartment,
M1.JobContractID,
SC.JobServiceID,
M1.Approve,
M1.EMP_HashKey,
M1.RecordCreatedDate,
M1.RecordUpdatedDate
FROM 
(

		SELECT 
		E.ASSOCIATE_ID					AS EmployeeID,
		HASHBYTES('SHA2_256', 
								CONCAT(
									COALESCE(E.ASSOCIATE_ID, ''), '|', 
									COALESCE(E.Division, ''), '|', 
									COALESCE(E.FIRST_NAME, ''), '|', 
									COALESCE(E.LAST_NAME, ''), '|', 
									COALESCE(E.JOB_TITLE_DESCRIPTION, ''), '|', 
									COALESCE(E.FLSA_DESCRIPTION, ''), '|', 
									COALESCE(E.WORK_CONTACT_WORK_EMAIL, ''), '|', 
									COALESCE(E.PAY_CLASS, ''), '|', 
									COALESCE(E.PAY_CLASS_TIMECLOCK_RESTRICTION_GROUP, ''), '|', 
									COALESCE(E.Benefits_Eligibility_Class_Description, '')
								)) AS EMP_HashKey,
								
		CASE
			WHEN E.Division IN ('FHIA','Renuity - Florida') 			THEN 'FHI'
			WHEN E.Division IN ('Renuity-Remote','Renuity-Charlotte') THEN 'REN'
			WHEN E.Division IN ('Closet America','Renuity Home Base') 				THEN 'CTA'
			WHEN E.Division='MaxHome' 						THEN 'MXH'
			WHEN E.Division='Statewide Remodeling' 			THEN 'SWR'
			WHEN E.Division IN ('Home Smart','Rite Window') THEN 'RTW'
			WHEN E.Division='Pacific Bath' OR E.Division LIKE '%WEST%'	THEN 'PBC'
			WHEN E.Division='Mad City' 						THEN 'MAC'
			WHEN E.Division IS NULL							THEN 'NA'
			ELSE E.Division END AS Division,
				
		
		E.Reports_To_AssociateID		AS ReportsToEmployeeID,
		E.APPROVE_SUPERVISOR_NAME		AS ApproverSupervisorID,
		L1.Location_PK					AS LocationPK,
		L2.Location_PK					AS LocationPK_FHIA_BJ,
		L3.Location_PK					AS LocationPK_GO_SOUTHERN,
		L4.Location_PK					AS LocationPK_MAC,
		L5.Location_PK					AS LocationPK_MXH,
		E.PAY_DATE						AS PayDate,
		E.TIME_IN						AS TimeIN,
		E.TIME_OUT						AS TimeOUT,
		E.HOURS							AS Hours,
		E.EARNINGS_CODE					AS EarningCode,
		E.WORKED_DEPARTMENT				AS WorkedDepartment,
		J.ContractID					AS JobContractID,
		E.TIMECARD_WORK_SERVICE_ID		AS TIMECARD_WORK_SERVICE_ID,
		E.APPROVE						AS Approve,
		GETDATE()						AS RecordCreatedDate,
		GETDATE()						AS RecordUpdatedDate
			
		FROM [ODS].[ADP_EMPLOYEE_TIMECARD]  E
		LEFT JOIN  [EDW].[DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE_LOCATION] L1 ON E.TIMECARD_WORK_LOCATION				= L1.LocationName AND L1.DataSource='Employee Timecard File'
		LEFT JOIN  [EDW].[DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE_LOCATION] L2 ON E.TIMECARD_WORK_FHIA_BJS_LOCATIONS	= L2.LocationName AND L2.DataSource='Employee Timecard File'
		LEFT JOIN  [EDW].[DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE_LOCATION] L3 ON E.TIMECARD_WORK_GO_SOUTHERN_LOCATION	= L3.LocationName AND L3.DataSource='Employee Timecard File'
		LEFT JOIN  [EDW].[DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE_LOCATION] L4 ON E.TIMECARD_WORK_MADCITY_LOCATION		= L4.LocationName AND L4.DataSource='Employee Timecard File'
		LEFT JOIN  [EDW].[DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE_LOCATION] L5 ON E.TIMECARD_WORK_MAXHOME_LOCATION		= L5.LocationName AND L5.DataSource='Employee Timecard File'
		LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT ContractID FROM  EDW.FACT_JOB ) J 
			ON E.TIMECARD_WORK_CARPENTERS_JOB_NUMBER = J.ContractID
		--WHERE E.ASSOCIATE_ID='38DMHAZ0X'
		
		) M1
		
JOIN (SELECT * FROM EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE WHERE CurrentRecordFlag='Y') E1 
ON M1.EmployeeID = E1.EmployeeID

LEFT JOIN  
		(
				(
		
					SELECT Employee_PK,EmployeeID FROM
					(
					SELECT 
					Employee_PK,
					EmployeeID,
					ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY  EmployeeID ORDER BY Employee_PK DESC) AS RW
					FROM EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE 
					) A1
					WHERE RW=1
					
					)
				) E3
ON M1.ApproverSupervisorID = E3.EmployeeID


LEFT JOIN [EDW].[FACT_JOB_SERVICE] SC 
ON CONCAT(M1.Division,'-',M1.TIMECARD_WORK_SERVICE_ID) = SC.JobServiceID

SELECT DISTINCT
CAST(A.PayDate AS DATE)				AS PayDate,
CAST(A.PeriodBeginningDate AS DATE)	AS PeriodBeginningDate,
CAST(A.PeriodEndDate AS DATE)			AS PeriodEndDate,
E.Employee_PK,
A.EmployeeID,
/*
CASE 
	WHEN A.Division LIKE '%Home Smart%'				THEN 'HSI'
	WHEN A.Division LIKE '%Pacific Bath%'			THEN 'PBC'
	WHEN A.Division LIKE '%Paradise%'				THEN 'PHI'
	WHEN A.Division LIKE '%Mad%'					THEN 'MAC'
	WHEN A.Division LIKE '%Renuity%'				THEN 'REN'
	WHEN A.Division LIKE '%Pacific%' OR A.Division LIKE '%WEST%'THEN 'PBC'
	WHEN A.Division LIKE '%Rite Window%'			THEN 'RTW'
	WHEN A.Division LIKE '%Statewide%'				THEN 'SWR'
	WHEN A.Division LIKE '%Closet America%'			THEN 'CTA'
	WHEN A.Division LIKE '%FHIA%'					THEN 'FHI'
	WHEN A.Division LIKE '%MaxHome%'				THEN 'MXH'
	END AS Division,
	
*/

E.Division,

 CAST(A.WeekNumber AS INT) AS WeekNumber,
	
	CASE 
        WHEN A.PayrollNumber LIKE '(%' THEN -CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(A.PayrollNumber, '(', ''), ')', ''), ',', '') AS INT)
        ELSE CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(A.PayrollNumber, '$', ''), ',', '') AS INT)
    END AS PayrollNumber,

	CASE 
        WHEN A.DistributionNumber LIKE '(%' THEN -CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(A.DistributionNumber, '(', ''), ')', ''), ',', '') AS INT)
        ELSE CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(A.DistributionNumber, '$', ''), ',', '') AS INT)
    END AS DistributionNumber,

	
	 CASE 
        WHEN A.RegularPayRateAmount LIKE '(%' THEN -CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(A.RegularPayRateAmount, '(', ''), ')', ''), ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2))
        ELSE CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(A.RegularPayRateAmount, '$', ''), ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2))
    END AS RegularPayRateAmount,

	
    A.RegularPayRateDescription,

    CASE 
        WHEN A.GrossPay LIKE '(%' THEN -CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(A.GrossPay, '(', ''), ')', ''), ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2))
        ELSE CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(A.GrossPay, '$', ''), ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2))
    END AS GrossPay,

    CASE 
        WHEN A.RegularHoursTotal LIKE '(%' THEN -CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(A.RegularHoursTotal, '(', ''), ')', ''), ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2))
        ELSE CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(A.RegularHoursTotal, '$', ''), ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2))
    END AS RegularHoursTotal,

    CASE 
        WHEN A.OvertimeHoursTotal LIKE '(%' THEN -CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(A.OvertimeHoursTotal, '(', ''), ')', ''), ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2))
        ELSE CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(A.OvertimeHoursTotal, '$', ''), ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2))
    END AS OvertimeHoursTotal,

    CASE 
        WHEN A.PBD_1_2PaidBday_Hours LIKE '(%' THEN -CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(A.PBD_1_2PaidBday_Hours, '(', ''), ')', ''), ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2))
        ELSE CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(A.PBD_1_2PaidBday_Hours, '$', ''), ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2))
    END AS PBD_1_2PaidBday_Hours,

    CASE 
        WHEN A.PTO_Hours LIKE '(%' THEN -CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(A.PTO_Hours, '(', ''), ')', ''), ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2))
        ELSE CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(A.PTO_Hours, '$', ''), ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2))
    END AS PTO_Hours,

    CASE 
        WHEN A.SI1_SickPay_Hours LIKE '(%' THEN -CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(A.SI1_SickPay_Hours, '(', ''), ')', ''), ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2))
        ELSE CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(A.SI1_SickPay_Hours, '$', ''), ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2))
    END AS SI1_SickPay_Hours,

    CASE 
        WHEN A.TotalHours LIKE '(%' THEN -CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(A.TotalHours, '(', ''), ')', ''), ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2))
        ELSE CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(A.TotalHours, '$', ''), ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2))
    END AS TotalHours,

    CASE 
        WHEN A.RegularEarningsTotal LIKE '(%' THEN -CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(A.RegularEarningsTotal, '(', ''), ')', ''), ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2))
        ELSE CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(A.RegularEarningsTotal, '$', ''), ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2))
    END AS RegularEarningsTotal,

    CASE 
        WHEN A.OvertimeEarningsTotal LIKE '(%' THEN -CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(A.OvertimeEarningsTotal, '(', ''), ')', ''), ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2))
        ELSE CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(A.OvertimeEarningsTotal, '$', ''), ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2))
    END AS OvertimeEarningsTotal,

    CASE 
        WHEN A.BON_BONUS_Earnings LIKE '(%' THEN -CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(A.BON_BONUS_Earnings, '(', ''), ')', ''), ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2))
        ELSE CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(A.BON_BONUS_Earnings, '$', ''), ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2))
    END AS BON_BONUS_Earnings,

	 CASE 
        WHEN A.COM_COMMISSION_Earnings LIKE '(%' THEN -CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(A.COM_COMMISSION_Earnings, '(', ''), ')', ''), ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2))
        ELSE CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(A.COM_COMMISSION_Earnings, '$', ''), ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2))
    END AS COM_COMMISSION_Earnings,

    CASE 
        WHEN A.CPA_Earnings LIKE '(%' THEN -CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(A.CPA_Earnings, '(', ''), ')', ''), ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2))
        ELSE CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(A.CPA_Earnings, '$', ''), ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2))
    END AS CPA_Earnings,

    CASE 
        WHEN A.INC_Commission_Earnings LIKE '(%' THEN -CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(A.INC_Commission_Earnings, '(', ''), ')', ''), ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2))
        ELSE CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(A.INC_Commission_Earnings, '$', ''), ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2))
    END AS INC_Commission_Earnings,

    CASE 
        WHEN A.PBD_1_2PaidBday_Earnings LIKE '(%' THEN -CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(A.PBD_1_2PaidBday_Earnings, '(', ''), ')', ''), ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2))
        ELSE CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(A.PBD_1_2PaidBday_Earnings, '$', ''), ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2))
    END AS PBD_1_2PaidBday_Earnings,

    CASE 
        WHEN A.PTO_Earnings LIKE '(%' THEN -CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(A.PTO_Earnings, '(', ''), ')', ''), ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2))
        ELSE CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(A.PTO_Earnings, '$', ''), ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2))
    END AS PTO_Earnings,

    CASE 
        WHEN A.SI1_SickPay_Earnings LIKE '(%' THEN -CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(A.SI1_SickPay_Earnings, '(', ''), ')', ''), ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2))
        ELSE CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(A.SI1_SickPay_Earnings, '$', ''), ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2))
    END AS SI1_SickPay_Earnings,

    CASE 
        WHEN A.TotalEarnings LIKE '(%' THEN -CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(A.TotalEarnings, '(', ''), ')', ''), ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2))
        ELSE CAST(REPLACE(REPLACE(A.TotalEarnings, '$', ''), ',', '') AS DECIMAL(10,2))
    END AS TotalEarnings,

    GETDATE() AS RecordCreatedDate,
    GETDATE() AS RecordUpdatedDate

FROM ODS.ADP_WAGES_PAYROLL_REPORT A 
LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE E
ON A.EmployeeID = E.EmployeeID

scripts.text:
UPDATE A
SET A.Employee_PK = B.Employee_PK
FROM EDW.FACT_HR_EMPLOYEE_TIMECARD A
JOIN EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE B 
ON A.EmployeeID = B.EmployeeID
WHERE B.CurrentRecordFlag='Y'
AND A.Employee_PK!=B.Employee_PK;


UPDATE A
SET A.Employee_PK = B.Employee_PK
FROM EDW.FACT_HR_EMPLOYEE_WAGES A
JOIN EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE B 
ON A.EmployeeID = B.EmployeeID
WHERE B.CurrentRecordFlag='Y'
AND A.Employee_PK!=B.Employee_PK;


UPDATE A
SET A.Employee_PK = B.Employee_PK
FROM EDW.FACT_HR_EMPLOYEE_TIMEOFF A
JOIN EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE B 
ON A.EmployeeID = B.EmployeeID
WHERE B.CurrentRecordFlag='Y'
AND A.Employee_PK!=B.Employee_PK;

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT  
DISTINCT 
E.Employee_PK
,A.AssociateID			AS		EmployeeID
,CASE WHEN A.SubmittedDate IS NULL OR A.SubmittedDate='' THEN NULL ELSE CAST(A.SubmittedDate AS DATE)	END	AS		SubmissionDate
,CASE WHEN A.RequestDate IS NULL OR A.RequestDate ='' THEN NULL ELSE CAST(A.RequestDate AS DATE) END		AS		TimeoffReqDate
,A.ReasonCode			AS		ReasonCode
,A.PositionID			AS		PositionID
,A.PayrollCompanyCode	AS		CompanyCode
,A.HomeDept				AS		WorkedDepartment
,A.LocationCode			AS		Location
,A.LocationDesc			AS		LocationDesc
,A.ReportsTo			AS		ReportsTo
,A.PolicyName			AS		PolicyName
,A.RequestedBy			AS		SubmittedBy
,A.StartTime			AS		StartTime
,CASE WHEN A.Amount IS NULL OR A.Amount='' THEN NULL ELSE CAST(LEFT(A.Amount, CHARINDEX(' ', A.Amount) - 1) AS FLOAT) END		AS Duration
,CASE WHEN A.Amount IS NULL OR A.Amount='' THEN NULL ELSE LTRIM(RIGHT(A.Amount, LEN(A.Amount) - CHARINDEX(' ', A.Amount))) END	AS Day_Hours
,'Approved' 			AS 		RequestStatus
,CAST(NULL AS DATE) 	AS 		LastReviewDate
,A.Modified_ApprovedBy	AS		ReviewerName
,A.Comments				AS		Comments
,A.Notes				AS		Notes
,CASE WHEN A.TransactionDate IS NULL OR A.TransactionDate='' THEN NULL ELSE CAST(A.TransactionDate AS DATE)	END	AS		TransactionDate
,CASE WHEN A.ReviewByDate IS NULL OR A.ReviewByDate ='' THEN NULL ELSE CAST(A.ReviewByDate AS DATE) END			AS		ReviewDate
,A.LastReviewedBy		AS		LastReviewBy
,A.RequestType			AS		RequestType
,A.ReviewerComments		AS		ReviewerComments
,GETDATE() AS CreatedTS
,GETDATE() AS LastUpdatedTS

FROM [ODS].[ADP_EMPLOYEE_TIMEOFF] A
JOIN EDW.DIM_HR_EMPLOYEE E
ON A.AssociateID = E.EmployeeID
